title: Remarkably Plus
description: This is a optimization modpack focuses on Performace of Minecraft in Fabric. As well as a Required modpack for EARTH SMP
body:
# **Remarkably Plus:**
-  This Modpack Focuses on Performance of Minecraft in **Fabric Mod Loader**
-  Includes many Performance boosting mods like **Sodium,Lithium,C2ME,etc.**
-  We focus on making **Minecraft** a real **Medival Game**.
-  Using Legendary mods like **small ships** and **nifty carts**.
-  This modpack is Required for the coming **Season 5** of The **NATION-SMP**
-  Includes Some required dependent mods for the **NationSMP Season-5**
# Introducing Remarkably Plus!
Experience smooth gameplay, fast loading times, and a performance boost that'll leave your game feeling remarkable! This modpack not only enhances performance but also includes shader support, zoom, and connected textures!
# Why Remarkably Plus?
The goal of Remarkably Plus is to create a super easy way for people to increase their performance while providing just the most essential OptiFine features. It cuts back on some of the clutter in other OptiFine replacement packs that I believe most players will not use.
# Works Anywhere
Remarkably Plus doesn't add any additional content to the game, allowing for compatibility with most any world or server. Also it is Required for **NationSMP Survival Season 5**.
# Credits
I used all Performance mods of **DillPickle66** from his modpack **Remarkably Optimized**. If you want performance mods only check [Remarkably Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/remarkably)
